styleGuide: Clean flat vector icon, 256x256 PNG, centered on transparent or near-white background. Must read INSTANTLY at 20-24px display size — no fine detail, no small text, no gradients, no shadows. Single bold focal subject. Use solid fills with 2-3 colors max per icon. Style should match Phosphor/Material/Iconify aesthetic. Every icon is paired with descriptive text in the UI, so the icon's job is to be a unmistakable symbol of the concept — literal and concrete, never abstract.

icons.name: reliability-excel
icons.prompt: A wall calendar page with a large bold green checkmark (#16a34a) covering the center. Navy (#1a365d) calendar outline with visible grid squares. The checkmark is thick and confident. Symbolizes 'shows up when scheduled'. Flat vector, no shadows. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: reliability-flag
icons.prompt: A wall calendar page with a large bold red X (#dc2626) crossing through it. Navy (#1a365d) calendar outline. Symbolizes missed appointments and no-shows. Flat vector, no shadows. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: pricing-excel
icons.prompt: A bold dollar sign $ in navy (#1a365d) with a green checkmark (#16a34a) overlapping the bottom-right. The checkmark partially covers the lower portion of the dollar sign. Clean flat vector. Symbolizes fair, honest pricing. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: pricing-flag
icons.prompt: A bold dollar sign $ in navy (#1a365d) with a red up-arrow (#dc2626) behind or emerging from the top, indicating inflated prices. The arrow should be clearly pointing up. Flat vector style. Symbolizes overpriced, surprise fees. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: workmanship-excel
icons.prompt: A chunky open-end wrench in navy (#1a365d) with a green checkmark (#16a34a) overlapping the handle end. The wrench is the dominant shape, recognizable as a plumbing tool. Flat vector, no shadows. Symbolizes quality work. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: workmanship-flag
icons.prompt: A chunky open-end wrench in navy (#1a365d) with a prominent red warning triangle (#dc2626) containing a white exclamation mark overlapping the wrench handle. The warning triangle should be clearly visible. Flat vector, no shadows. Symbolizes quality issues, botched work. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: responsiveness-excel
icons.prompt: A stopwatch or round analog timer showing a fast time, with a green checkmark (#16a34a) overlapping the face. Navy (#1a365d) outline of the stopwatch with a small button on top. Clean flat vector. Symbolizes quick response, fast arrival. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: responsiveness-flag
icons.prompt: A snail silhouette in amber (#d97706) with a navy (#1a365d) spiral shell. The snail is clearly recognizable. Flat vector, no shadows. Symbolizes slow response, long waits. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: communication-excel
icons.prompt: A rounded speech bubble (like SMS/chat bubble) in navy (#1a365d) with three thick horizontal text lines inside and a green checkmark (#16a34a) next to or inside the bubble. The text lines clearly suggest 'clear explanation'. Flat vector. Symbolizes good communication. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: communication-flag
icons.prompt: A rounded speech bubble in navy (#1a365d) with a large bold red question mark (#dc2626) inside it. The question mark is the dominant internal element. Flat vector, no shadows. Symbolizes unclear or confusing communication. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: consistency-excel
icons.prompt: Three identical five-pointed stars in green (#16a34a), arranged in a horizontal row, all the same size and evenly spaced. Flat vector. Symbolizes consistent quality across visits. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: variance-flag
icons.prompt: Three five-pointed stars in a horizontal row of visibly different sizes (big, small, medium) in amber (#d97706), suggesting inconsistent quality. Flat vector, no shadows. Symbolizes hit-or-miss service. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: platform-mismatch
icons.prompt: Two review-star rating rows stacked vertically: top row shows 5 solid gold stars (#ca8a04), bottom row shows 3 solid gold stars followed by 2 empty outline stars. A small amber (#d97706) diagonal line or lightning-style arrow between the two rows emphasizing the mismatch. Flat vector. Symbolizes Google-vs-Yelp rating disagreement. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: bbb-accredited
icons.prompt: A shield shape in navy (#1a365d) with the large bold letters 'A+' in white centered inside it. The shield is simple and official-looking. Flat vector, no shadows, no gradients. Symbolizes BBB A+ accreditation. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: bbb-concerns
icons.prompt: A shield shape in navy (#1a365d) outline with a large red warning triangle (#dc2626) containing a white exclamation mark in the center of the shield. Flat vector, no shadows. Symbolizes BBB complaints on record. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: sample-warning
icons.prompt: A magnifying glass in navy (#1a365d) hovering over 3 small dots arranged in a triangle pattern, suggesting 'small sample size'. An amber question mark (#d97706) is near the magnifying glass. Flat vector, no shadows. Symbolizes limited review data. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: verdict-strong-hire
icons.prompt: A trophy cup in solid gold (#ca8a04) on a small base, with two small handles on either side of the cup. Simple, bold, unmistakable trophy shape. Flat vector, no shadows, no gradients. Symbolizes 'top pick' verdict. NOT a circular seal — it should look like a trophy award. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: verdict-conditional
icons.prompt: A thumbs-up hand gesture in solid green (#16a34a). Simple, bold, clean silhouette of a thumb raised upward from a fist. Flat vector, no shadows, no fine details. Symbolizes 'solid choice' verdict. NOT a circular seal — just the thumbs-up shape standing alone. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: verdict-caution
icons.prompt: A classic warning triangle in amber (#d97706) with a bold white exclamation mark centered inside. Equilateral triangle pointing up, thick amber border. Flat vector, no shadows, no gradients. Symbolizes 'proceed with caution' verdict. NOT a circular seal — it is a triangle. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.

icons.name: verdict-avoid
icons.prompt: An octagonal stop-sign shape in solid red (#dc2626) with bold white letters 'NO' centered inside. The octagon is chunky and recognizable like a road stop sign. Flat vector, no shadows, no gradients. Symbolizes 'avoid' verdict. NOT a circular seal — it is an octagon. 256x256, centered, readable at 24px.
